descGu: Pizza ના ટુકડા! Half, quarter શીખો.
descEn: Slice the pizza! Learn half and quarter.

teacherGuide.conceptGu: અપૂર્ણાંક = whole ના ભાગ. Half (½) = 2 equal pieces, 1 લો. Quarter (¼) = 4 equal pieces, 1 લો. Equal size = most important concept. Pizza, chocolate bar, paper fold — physical demonstration essential.
teacherGuide.conceptEn: Fractions = equal parts of a whole. Half=1/2, Quarter=1/4. Equal size is key.
teacherGuide.storyGu: 'Yuval, pizza ના 2 equal slices — તમે 1 લો = half! 4 equal slices — 1 લો = quarter! Computer graphics, screen divide — same fraction math use!'
teacherGuide.scriptGu: 'Paper fold! Half fold = 2 equal parts. Fold again = 4 equal parts = quarters. Open and see the lines!'
teacherGuide.tipsGu: 💡 Chocolate bar break in half — count squares each side same? Paper fold and unfold — see equal parts. Apple cut! Physical = best.

questions.textEn: Pizza cut into 2 equal pieces. Take 1 piece = ?
Chocolate bar cut into 4 equal pieces. Take 1 = ?
Pizza has 4 slices. You eat 3. What fraction did you eat?

questions.textGu: 🍫 Yuval ના 12 chocolates. Half friend ને આપ્યા. Yuval પાસે કેટલા?
questions.textEn: Yuval has 12 chocolates. Gives half to friend. How many does Yuval keep?
